title: Summoner limited summons a hand creature within the 2d6 AL result

card.rawText: During your turn, roll 2 dice. You may summon a creature from your hand with an AL less than or equal to the result of the dice roll as a Limited Summon. Send the summoned creature back to your hand at the end of your turn.

effect.value: Limited Summon creature with AL <= 2D6 result

plan.title: Summoner limited summons a hand creature within the 2d6 AL result
plan.summary: Activate Summoner, force a 2d6 total of 6, and verify a hand creature with AL 5 enters as a Limited Summon.

forcedRolls.label: Summoner AL gate succeeds with total 6

notes: Place Summoner on player_1 field as primary.
Keep Sharkling in player_1 hand as the AL 1 Limited Summon target.
Roll 2 dice; summoned creature AL must be less than or equal to the total.

steps: Choose the AL 5 hand creature as the Limited Summon target.

expectedAssertions.label: Limited Summon resolution used Summoner action

manualVerification: A creature with AL above the roll total should not be a valid target; this fixture confirms the successful AL-gated Limited Summon route.
riskNotes: This fixture proves the successful AL-gated Limited Summon branch.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_044_summoner-044-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
